text: The News: Microsoft revenue climbed for the fourth quarter of 2022 to $51.9 billion, up 12 percent from $46.2 billion one year ago, while the fiscal year 2022 revenue rose to $198.3 billion, up 18 percent from the $168.1 billion generated in FY2021. The results, which also included net income of $16.74 billion for Q4 and non-GAAP net income of $69.4 billion for FY2022, were announced on July 26 by Microsoft after the markets closed. Read the full earnings Press Release on the Microsoft Investor Relations website.
